description: Lead is currently in the process of purchasing a property specifically for STR. Has not yet completed on the purchase. Timeline depends on conveyancing and mortgage completion.
typical_timeline: 2-6 months depending on chain and mortgage complexity
key_questions_to_ask: Where are you in the purchase process?
Do you have a solicitor instructed?
Do you have a target completion date?
what_to_do: Validate their STR income expectations against realistic projections for that property
Flag any restrictions early — London 90-day rule, leasehold restrictions
Send management agreement to sign now — can start immediately on completion
Keep warm with quarterly check-ins if timeline is long
what_not_to_do: over-promise on income before seeing the actual property
forget to check for planning or lease restrictions on their specific property
risk_factors: lead buys different property than planned
follow_up_cadence: Monthly until exchange, then weekly as completion approaches

notable_leads.name: Nicholas
notable_leads.note: Also DLY-FUR. Buying then furnishing. Long pipeline but committed.

notable_leads.name: Nina
notable_leads.note: Lost — purchase fell through or timing out. Classic DLY-PUR risk.

notable_leads.name: Marcus
notable_leads.note: Most recent. Analytical. Needs income proof to validate purchase decision.
